_comment: Padding experiment config. Token values are measured offline and the service does not call a tokenizer at runtime.
_usage: Only translated_text is padded. The server computes the remaining token budget and inserts pad chars uniformly into translated_text.

zwc._comment: Zero-width padding mode. tokens_per_char is the offline-measured token cost of one inserted zero-width character.

ascii._comment: Visible ASCII padding mode. tokens_per_char is the offline-measured token cost of one inserted ASCII padding character.
